name: roasting
description: 5-Color Harness execution engine for Korean business leaders. Auto-routes 68 white-collar artifact cases (email, board memo, investor letter, landing page, image-prompt set, hand-coded website, DART company brief, strategy memo, etc.) and produces output via BLACK Producer + RGSB Reviewer team with debate-driven scoring. HTML builder has 4 modes: slides / landing / direct / assisted. Generic fallback (case unmatched) still runs full BLACK+RGSB workflow with 9.5 gate. Design-related cases auto-enrich Leonxlnx/taste-skill (design-taste-frontend, brandkit, imagegen) for anti-slop output. Korean only.
